semantic.role: End-to-end (E2E) integration test suite for the ArchSpine CLI.
responsibilities: Sets up isolated temporary directories with git initialization to test the CLI in a clean environment.
Invokes the built CLI binary (`dist/cli/index.js`) and captures its stdout/stderr exit codes to verify behavior.
Creates configuration files (e.g., `.archspine/arch-spine-config.json`) and validates the CLI's ability to read and output configuration.
Cleans up temporary directories after each test to ensure isolation between test cases.
Verifies that the CLI correctly initializes a mirror repository and produces expected log output.
outOfScope: Not a production module; does not define any public API or export symbols.
Not intended for unit testing of internal components or library code.
Does not test the CLI in a production deployment scenario (uses a local build).
invariants: All tests must use the built CLI from `dist/cli/index.js`.
Each test must clean up its temporary directory after execution.
Tests must run in an isolated temporary directory with a fresh git repository.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide real-user simulation tests that validate the CLI's end-to-end workflow without mocking the file system or git.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: The commit message 'fix: resolve ESLint errors, E2E prompt injection, and better-sqlite3 compat' suggests that the test suite may have been adjusted to fix issues with prompt injection and compatibility, though no direct evidence of that is visible in the symbolic AST.

English.role: End-to-end integration test suite for the ArchSpine CLI.
responsibilities: Sets up isolated temporary directories with git initialization to test the CLI in a clean environment.
Invokes the built CLI binary (`dist/cli/index.js`) and captures its stdout/stderr and exit codes to verify behavior.
Creates configuration files (e.g., `.archspine/arch-spine-config.json`) and validates the CLI's ability to read and output configuration.
Cleans up temporary directories after each test to ensure isolation between test cases.
Verifies the CLI correctly initializes a mirror repository and produces expected log output.
outOfScope: Not a production module; does not define any public API or export symbols.
Not intended for unit testing of internal components or library code.
Does not test the CLI in a production deployment scenario (uses a local build).
